eval.reason: The implementation adds incomplete run IDs and timestamps to the `run_completed_count == 0 && run_started` branch when `id == "last-failure"`, filters RunStarted events whose run_id is absent from RunCompleted events, caps at 5 entries, uses existing helpers (`event_string`, `event_timestamp_ms`, `format_timestamp_ms`), preserves all existing guidance for other branches, and includes passing tests for single incomplete run, multiple runs capped at 5, and custom ID preserving generic behavior. Build and tests pass.

task_file_title: Show incomplete run IDs and lifecycle detail in `state why last-failure` cold-start diagnostics
